results.title: BofA Report Compares Big Oil Cos | Rigzone
XOM vs. CVX: Which Oil Stock Offers More Upside in 2026? - TipRanks
Exxon Mobil vs. Chevron - Which Oil Giant Is a Buy for 2026?

summary: BofA prefers Buy-rated CVX over Neutral XOM and Shell on FCF inflection. XOM 2025 earnings $28.8B vs CVX $12.29B. Shell/BP cut dividends in 2020; CVX maintained 38-year dividend growth streak. CVX seen as more capital-disciplined with lower breakeven. Oil spike from Iran tensions benefiting all majors.
